case_title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. VS. ERIC HOLLIN

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLIN, ERIC SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
